blocks.content: He called in under a minute.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Daisy.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Who is she.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: She's in my film group. I told you about her. Cassidy Walsh.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You told me she was good at logistics. You didn't tell me she puts her hand on your arm at parties.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: That photo is a two-second moment out of a whole night.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Then tell me about the whole night.
He did. He told her most of it — the group, the party, the fire pit. He told her Cassidy was there.
He didn't tell her about the wall. The roommate. The thing Cassidy said and the two seconds before he answered.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: That's it. That's the whole night.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah.
She had known him for seven years. She heard the edit.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You're leaving something out.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm not.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You are. I know how you talk when you're giving me the version you decided on ahead of time. What actually happened.
Silence.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: She made a comment. At the party. About — it doesn't matter. Nothing happened.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: What kind of comment.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: The kind that had an obvious meaning.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: And.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And I told her no. Nothing happened, Daisy. I walked out.
She was quiet on her end. He could hear her thinking.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: How do I know that.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Because I'm telling you.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit. You couldn't even tell me you kissed Brooke. I had to hear that from Savannah. You sat across from me for how long and couldn't say it — why would this be any different?
